about.title: Orchid
about.subtitle: Island
about.description: Your trusted partner in prestige real estate in Morocco. For over 15 years, we have been supporting our clients in their most ambitious real estate projects.

story.title: Our Story
story.description1: Founded in 2008, Orchid Island was born from the vision of creating a different real estate agency, focused on service excellence and client satisfaction. We specialize in high-end real estate throughout Morocco.
story.description2: Our team of passionate experts accompanies you through every step of your real estate project, whether for purchasing, selling, or investing in exceptional properties.
features: Recognized expertise in luxury real estate
In-depth knowledge of the Moroccan market

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide our daily action and our commitment to our clients.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: We build lasting relationships based on transparency and integrity.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We strive for excellence in every transaction and service we offer.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: Our passion for real estate drives us to exceed your expectations.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We use the latest technologies to optimize your experience.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Experienced and passionate professionals, dedicated to your real estate success.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To support our clients in realizing their real estate projects by offering excellent service, sound advice and personalized support. We are committed to creating lasting value for our clients and partners.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the undisputed reference in prestige real estate in Morocco, recognized for our expertise, integrity and capacity for innovation. We aspire to transform our clients' real estate experience.

marrakech.title: Our Presence in Marrakech
marrakech.subtitle: Discover our areas of expertise in the Pearl of the South and our exclusive properties in Marrakech's most prestigious neighborhoods.
marrakech.description: Marrakech represents one of our most dynamic markets with over 420 prestige properties in our portfolio. Our local expertise allows us to offer the best investment opportunities.

palmeraie.title: Palmeraie
palmeraie.description: Luxury villas with private pools and landscaped gardens. Average price: 8-25M DH

hivernage.title: Hivernage
hivernage.description: Modern district with high-end apartments and renovated riads. Average price: 3-12M DH

gueliz.title: Gueliz
gueliz.description: Modern city center with penthouses and premium offices. Average price: 2-8M DH

office.title: Marrakech Office
office.address: Avenue Mohammed VI, Résidence Al Manar, Gueliz

community.title: Our Commitment to Community
community.subtitle: Supporting Local Communities
community.description: At Orchid Island, we firmly believe in sustainable development and supporting local communities. Our commitment goes beyond real estate to create a positive impact in Moroccan society.
community.description2: Discover how we collaborate with local associations to improve community life and contribute to Morocco's social development.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subtitle: Contact our team of experts for a personalized consultation and discover how we can help you realize your real estate ambitions.
